- audit_tb_todos: exit 0
  cmd: /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/python3 /Users/brian/Desktop/Project/brian_hw/common_ai_agent/workflow/tb-gen/scripts/derive_tb_todos.py parity_gen_cx1 --root /Users/brian/Desktop/Project/brian_hw/common_ai_agent --audit-tb
  stdout:
[derive_tb_todos] parity_gen_cx1: tasks=64 blockers=0 authoring_open=0 validation_open=6 gate=pass

expected artifacts:
- parity_gen_cx1/tb/cocotb/test_parity_gen_cx1.py
- parity_gen_cx1/tb/cocotb/test_runner.py
- parity_gen_cx1/tb/cocotb/tb_manifest.json
- parity_gen_cx1/tb/cocotb/tb_generation.json
- parity_gen_cx1/tb/tb_todo_plan.json
- parity_gen_cx1/tb/tb_todo_tracker.json
- parity_gen_cx1/tb/tb_traceability.json
- parity_gen_cx1/sim/scoreboard_events.jsonl after /sim
- parity_gen_cx1/cov/coverage.json after /sim
- parity_gen_cx1/tb/tb_todo_plan.json
- parity_gen_cx1/todo/tb_todo_tracker.json
- parity_gen_cx1/tb/tb_todo_tracker.json

next: run /sim, /coverage, and derive_tb_todos.py --audit-evidence to close contract validation evidence.

policy.authority_rule: Expected behavior comes from locked req contracts plus SSOT Function/Cycle model; RTL is DUT structure only.
policy.timing_rule: Structural signal timing.kind/clock_domain/sync_to drives TB driver/monitor synchronization when present.
policy.validation_rule: TB authoring PASS requires --audit-tb; contract validation closure requires --audit-evidence after sim and coverage.
policy.visible_todo_rule: Expose one visible gen-tb TODO while preserving every per-contract validation row in tb/tb_todo_plan.json.

tasks.content: Read SSOT and build dynamic TB validation ledger
criteria: tb_todo_plan.json was regenerated from the current SSOT and locked contracts
Each structural/behavioral contract maps to TB authoring or evidence responsibilities
No expected behavior is inferred from RTL observations
tasks.detail: Use tb_todo_plan.json as the verification checklist. Fixed templates are generator helpers only, not authority.

todo_completion.reason: TB authoring artifacts are present and structurally mapped.

tasks.content: Gate: TB authority inputs are present and contract-owned
criteria: SSOT YAML is present
function_model, cycle_model, and test_requirements are present or an SSOT blocker is emitted
verify/equivalence_goals.json and rtl/rtl_contract.json exist before generated scoreboard approval
Locked behavioral/structural contract files are loaded directly when present
tasks.detail: TB generation must derive stimulus and expected behavior from locked req contracts, SSOT Function/Cycle models, equivalence goals, and the RTL contract.

todo_completion.reason: TB authoring artifacts are present and structurally mapped.

tasks.content: Gate: generated cocotb/pyuvm TB artifacts are present
criteria: test_<ip>.py, test_runner.py, transactions.py, sequences.py, agents.py, scoreboard.py, tb_coverage.py, and uvm_env.py exist
tb_manifest.json top matches SSOT top_module.name
tb_generation.json reports status=pass
tasks.detail: Generated TB must contain the layered files, manifest, and generation report expected by the common TB flow.

todo_completion.reason: TB authoring artifacts are present and structurally mapped.

tasks.content: Gate: common equivalence scoreboard contract is loadable
criteria: workflow/tb-gen/runtime/equivalence_scoreboard.py --self-check passes
Generated scoreboard.py imports or wraps EquivalenceScoreboard
scoreboard rows are configured from verify/equivalence_goals.json
tasks.detail: The generated TB must preserve EquivalenceScoreboard as the expected-behavior adapter instead of copying observed RTL behavior.

todo_completion.reason: TB authoring artifacts are present and structurally mapped.

tasks.content: Gate: simulation emits passing scoreboard events for required goals
criteria: sim/scoreboard_events.jsonl exists
At least one required unblocked goal has a passing scoreboard row
Rows contain goal_id, scenario_id, stimulus, fl_expected, rtl_observed, passed, and coverage_refs
tasks.detail: TB validation is not closed by file generation alone. Simulation must emit RTL-observed scoreboard rows carrying goal IDs and coverage refs.

todo_completion.reason: Simulation/coverage evidence audit has not run yet.

tasks.content: Gate: TB evidence reaches functional/cycle coverage closure
criteria: cov/coverage.json exists
coverage status is pass
rtl_observed coverage has no missing bins or invalid rows when reported
tasks.detail: Coverage evidence must come from generic coverage artifacts and passing scoreboard rows, not IP-specific parsers or weakened bins.

todo_completion.reason: Simulation/coverage evidence audit has not run yet.

tasks.content: Gate: every locked contract has TB validation evidence
criteria: Behavioral contract stimulus and scoreboard rows are authored
Structural signals are mapped to driver/monitor responsibilities with timing/synchronization notes
Passing scoreboard or coverage evidence references the contract/goal aliases
tasks.detail: Each obligation-owned behavioral/structural contract must map to stimulus, observation, scoreboard/assertion, and coverage or carry an explicit human gate.

todo_completion.reason: Simulation/coverage evidence audit has not run yet.

tasks.content: Gate: every required tb_todo_plan item is closed
criteria: open_required_todos is zero for the requested audit mode
all_required_todos_pass is true
tasks.detail: TB-gen PASS for validation evidence is forbidden until every required authoring and evidence ledger row has pass status.

todo_completion.reason: Simulation/coverage evidence audit has not run yet.

criteria: DUT port clk is bound in tb_manifest.json

tasks.detail: The TB must treat structural contract IO as executable driver/monitor responsibilities. Timing metadata records whether the signal is sync, async, reset, clock, or cross-domain.
